content.principles: AbstractQueuedSynchronizer uses a volatile 'state' and a FIFO double-linked queue (CLH variant) to manage thread waiting. Supports exclusive (ReentrantLock) and shared (CountDownLatch, Semaphore) modes.
content.pitfalls: Improper state management in custom synchronizers. Deadlocks if not careful with acquisition order. Performance overhead of queue management in extremely high contention.
